name: pkm Notifier
description: Tray indicator showing available pkm package upgrades. Reads /var/lib/pkm/available-updates.json (written by the pkm-check-updates.timer-driven service) and surfaces an icon in the top bar when upgrades are available. Click to open a terminal pre-typed with `pkm upgrade --all --dry-run` for review. NEVER auto-upgrades; the user explicitly invokes the upgrade to act on the notification.
